implementation_summary: Fixed security vulnerability where relative customTargetPath could bypass CM_ROOT_DIR validation. Replaced isPathSafe() with validateWorktreePath() via resolveCustomTargetPath() helper to atomically validate and resolve paths to absolute paths under basePath. Added targetDir trim() and 1024-char length limit in route.ts.
commits: 2977379: fix(clone-manager): prevent relative path bypass in customTargetPath validation
message: TDD implementation complete. All 16 new tests pass (13 unit + 3 integration). Zero ESLint errors, zero TypeScript errors. Security vulnerability (Issue #392) fixed: relative paths now resolved to absolute paths under basePath before being passed to git clone.

security_notes.S4-001-T1: Double-encoded path traversal (%252e%252e%252f) resolves to literal directory name (%2e%2e%2f) under basePath - no bypass exists. Test updated to verify safe resolution instead of rejection.
security_notes.S4-001-T2: Single-encoded path traversal (..%2f) is correctly rejected by validateWorktreePath().
security_notes.D4-001: Error messages do not leak basePath or rootDir values to clients.
